questions.stem: 筆者が最も言いたいことは何か。
opts: 多様な社会の要求に応じられるように、教育のあり方を考え直すべきだ。
社会の不安を取り除くためには、教育を合理化・効率化すべきではない。
教育の改革によって、安定した社会を持続させていくことが必要だろう。
現代社会の問題のすべてが、教育で解決できると思ってはいけない。
questions.expl: Correct Answer Answer 4: 現代社会の問題のすべてが、教育で解決できると思ってはいけない。 It means "We must not think that all of the current societal problems can be solved through education." Question Translation What is the main thing the author wants to say? Explanation The passage discusses the limitations of education in solving societal problems. The author acknowledges the contributions of education but emphasizes its unpredictable nature and inability to solely address all societal issues. The passage points out the risk of placing excessive expectations on education, leading to an unbalanced and ineffective system. Therefore, Answer 4 best captures the author's main point — that societal issues are too complex to be entirely resolved through education alone. Why Other Options Are Incorrect - Answer 1: 多様な社会の要求に応じられるように、教育のあり方を考え直すべきだ。 ("We should reconsider the form of education to meet diverse social demands.") The passage does not suggest modifying education to meet various demands but rather warns against expecting education to solve all problems. - Answer 2: 社会の不安を取り除くためには、教育を合理化・効率化すべきではない。 ("To eliminate social anxiety, education should not be rationalized or made efficient.") This answer slightly touches on the theme but misplaces emphasis, as the passage highlights the dangers of overburdening education, not just about not rationalizing it. - Answer 3: 教育の改革によって、安定した社会を持続させていくことが必要だろう。 ("It is necessary to sustain a stable society through educational reform.") questions.stem: 次の 4 人は今年の４月に、運動教室を受講したいと考えている。この中で、この教室を受講できる人は誰か。 名前 年齢 住んでいる所 勤務地 健康度測定 ダニエルさん 54歳 木原市内 木原市外 去年の1月に受けた 木村さん 34歳 木原市外 木原市内 去年の10月に受けた 大川さん 16歳 木原市内 なし 今年の2月に受けた チェさん 27歳 木原市内 木原市内 今年の5月に受ける予定
questions.expl: Correct Answer Answer 2 (木村さん / Mr. Kimura) is correct. He meets both eligibility conditions. Question Translation "Four people want to take the exercise class this April. Who among them can take it?" Explanation Eligibility requires both: ① living in the city or working in the city, and being 18 or older; ② having taken the center’s health fitness measurement within the past 1 year counting back from the class date. Mr. Kimura works in the city and took the measurement last October, which is within one year of April. He is also over 18. Why Other Options Are Incorrect 1. ダニエルさん — "Mr. Daniel" → He lives in the city (OK) and is 54 (OK), but his measurement was last January, which is over 1 year before April → 3. 大川さん — "Mr./Ms. Ōkawa" → Measurement this February (within 1 year) and lives in the city (OK), but 16 years old → under 18 → 4. チェさん — "Mr./Ms. Che" → 27 and lives/works in the city (OK), but the measurement is scheduled for May (future), so as of April they have not taken it within the past year → Grammar/Vocabulary Note 「受講日から過去1年以内に受けた」 = "taken within the past one year counting back from the class date" (must already be completed by the class day).

questions.stem: シャヒンさんは、来週の「ダンス A」を予約したが、空きがあれば来週の「体操」も追加予約した いと考えている。どうすればいいか。
opts: 来週の月曜日以降に窓口か電話で空きを確認し、空きがあれば、窓口で予約する。
来週の月曜日以降に窓口か電話で空きを確認し、空きがあれば、予約機か電話で予約する。
来週の水曜日以降に窓口か電話で空きを確認し、空きがあれば、窓口で予約する。
来週の水曜日以降に窓口か電話で空きを確認し、空きがあれば、予約機か電話で予約する。
questions.expl: Correct Answer Answer 4 is correct. Question Translation "Shahin has booked next week’s ‘Dance A’ and wants to also add next week’s ‘Taisō (Exercise)’ if there’s a vacancy. What should they do?" Explanation An additional reservation is allowed only for classes that have not filled up and only starting two days before the class. ‘Taisō’ is on Friday, so from Wednesday (two days before) Shahin should check vacancies at the counter or by phone, and if there’s space, make the reservation by reservation machine or phone (since it’s the second and subsequent reservation, not the very first-ever one). Why Other Options Are Incorrect 1. 来週の月曜日以降に…窓口で予約する — "From next Monday… reserve at the counter" → Too early (Monday is 4 days before Friday; additional bookings start 2 days before). Also method is off for repeat reservations (should use machine/phone). 2. 来週の月曜日以降に…予約機か電話で予約する — "From next Monday… reserve by machine/phone" → Method is fine, but timing is wrong (must wait until Wednesday, two days before). 3. 来週の水曜日以降に…窓口で予約する — "From next Wednesday… reserve at the counter" → Timing is correct, but for second or later reservations the instructions say to use the reservation machine or phone, not the counter. Grammar/Vocabulary Note 「実施日の2日前に定員に達していないクラスに限り、…追加予約ができます」 clearly fixes the start timing for additional reservations and restricts them to classes with openings.
